provenance_sources.NORMALIZED_EVIDENCE_MAP: docs/pios/40.2/normalized_evidence_map.md — CEU IDs, overlap declarations, unknown-space
provenance_sources.STRUCTURAL_CONTAINMENT: physical directory structure of extracted source trees
provenance_sources.HTML_DOCUMENTED: CEU-01/CEU-02/CEU-03 HTML artifacts — documented labels and named constructs
provenance_sources.UNKNOWN_SOURCE: element whose derivation source cannot be traced to any of the above

classification_basis: CEU membership and html_influence classification derived from NORMALIZED_EVIDENCE_MAP + STRUCTURAL_CONTAINMENT; influence judgments based on HTML_DOCUMENTED content visibility in CEU-01/CEU-02/CEU-03

classification_scheme.DIRECT: Structural element was explicitly named, described, or structured in HTML documentation (CEU-01, CEU-02, CEU-03). Origin is traceable to HTML artifact.
classification_scheme.INDIRECT: Structural element's presence is consistent with HTML content but primary structural form was derived from source code (CEU-08, CEU-09, CEU-10). HTML may have shaped framing or labels.
classification_scheme.NONE: Structural element has no traceability to HTML documentation. Origin is entirely from code structure or extraction metadata.

influence_entries.basis: CEU-01, CEU-02, CEU-03 are themselves HTML documentation files. DOM-01 is structurally constituted by HTML artifacts.

Extraction analysis (CEU-04 through CEU-07) was performed against HTML-described structure. Analysis artifacts reflect structure visible in HTML but were derived by extraction process, not directly authored in HTML.

Backend as a top-level structural unit is referenced in CEU-01 architecture documentation. However, the specific directory structure, module list, and file composition come from CEU-08 code tree, not HTML.
Individual NestJS module names and directory structure are derived entirely from CEU-08 source code containment. HTML documentation does not enumerate 63 individual modules.

influence_entries.element_label: backend_src_common / config / database / events / gateways / health / migrations / test
influence_entries.basis: These sub-directory groupings are derived entirely from CEU-08 directory structure. No HTML artifact enumerates these sub-directories.
Infrastructure files are code artifacts. No HTML origin.
Frontend as a top-level structural unit is referenced in CEU-01. Specific directory structure comes from CEU-09 code tree.

HTML documentation (CEU-01 architecture, CEU-03 PMO dashboard) describes frontend capability areas. Directory names come from CEU-09 source structure but framing is consistent with HTML-described surfaces.

influence_entries.element_label: frontend_hooks / contexts / router / socket / utils / types / constants
influence_entries.basis: These are framework-level structural conventions (React patterns) derived entirely from CEU-09 directory containment. No HTML origin.
PWA, styles, storybook, and test infrastructure are code artifacts with no HTML origin.
Platform/integrated system framing is present in CEU-01 architecture. The integrated monorepo form is from CEU-10 containment.
svg-agents/ is a platform-unique directory in CEU-10 with no correspondence to any HTML documentation artifact. Origin is CEU-10 containment only.
Monitoring as a platform concern may be referenced in CEU-01 architecture. Specific monitoring/ directory is from CEU-10 containment.
load-tests/ is a code/infrastructure artifact with no HTML origin.
.github/workflows/ is a CI/CD infrastructure artifact with no HTML origin.
Raw tar archives are provenance artifacts, not ingested. No HTML origin.
